sourceTitle: How tech’s most resilient workers handle burnout
text: be time to consider a bigger change. Special thanks to the nearly 200 tech professionals who shared their insights *again* for this follow-up research. Your candid feedback will help us deal with burnout in the tech industry. 🙏 *Thank you, Noam! You can find Noam on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/noamsegal/) and [X](https://x.com/noamseg).* *Have a fulfilling, productive, and non-burnout-inducing week 🙏* **If you’re finding this newsletter valuable, share it with a friend, and consider subscribing if you haven’t already.
